_meta.frameworkDetail: Heavy JS rendering, role-based selectors, data-panel-id attributes. Custom Google components. Sidebar nav uses custom elements, not standard <a> tags. Many pages require specific sub-paths.
_meta.version: Google Workspace Admin Console 2026 (G Suite legacy free edition)

auth.mechanism: Google Account login with password + optional 2FA
auth.authenticatedSignal: url starts with admin.google.com and nav sidebar visible
auth.notes: Google login requires password entry by user. May require 2FA (phone prompt, authenticator). Extension cannot automate — must pause and wait for user.

detection_signals: Welcome to the Google Workspace Admin Console
dashboard_cards: Users: Active 23, Add/Delete/Update user, Create alternate email
Billing: Manage subscriptions, Payment accounts, Buy or upgrade
Alerts: Google Operations notifications (4 alerts from 2024)
Chrome Enterprise: Enrolled browsers 1, Managed profiles 0
product_updates: Google Meet is now available on CarPlay (Apr 2)
Export Google Vids directly to YouTube (Apr 2)
Google Vids Screen Recorder Chrome Extension (Apr 2)

insights: Secondary email address alert (mw.personalmail@gmail.com) — Review address action

admin-roles.note: Can assign admin roles to security groups as well as users

storage.shared_drives: Not available — current subscription doesn't include shared drives. Upgrade offered.

sidebar.label: Chrome browser
sidebar.note: Redirects to home — needs sidebar click

navigation.url_notes: Many sidebar items use JS-driven navigation with custom Google components. Direct URL navigation fails for some pages (returns 404). Pages that work with direct URLs: /ac/users, /ac/groups, /ac/orgunits, /ac/apps, /ac/appslist/core, /ac/security, /ac/devices/list, /ac/billing/subscriptions, /ac/accountsettings, /ac/roles, /ac/storage, /ac/domains/manage, /ac/dashboard. Pages that require sidebar click: /ac/chrome, /ac/generativeai, /ac/data, /ac/reporting, /ac/rules.

add-user-button.description: Add new user button on users page

create-group-button.description: Create group button on groups page

create-role-button.description: Create new role button on admin roles page

responses: role='main' content area renders with page heading
role='navigation' sidebar renders with section links
Progress indicator elements appear during loading

read_selectors.notes: Works well for most pages. Returns both nav sidebar and main content area.
